array.string: set -a && source /Users/frank/.voyager/countdown-resolve-loop.env && set +a && if [[ "${COUNTDOWN_RESOLVE_LOOP_ENABLED:-false}" == "true" ]]; then exec /Users/frank/.voyager/.venv/bin/vyg countdown resolve-loop --repos /Users/frank/.voyager/countdown-resolve-loop.repos --max-resolves ${COUNTDOWN_MAX_RESOLVES:-20} --json; else echo "COUNTDOWN_RESOLVE_LOOP_ENABLED is not true; skipping"; fi
